title: Smoky Ukrainian Anko Red Bean Paste Grill
description: A romantic Ukrainian dish featuring smoky, glassy-jelly anko-red-bean-paste served with cold-smoked ingredients. Perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Light the binchotan charcoal and let it burn until it reaches the gray coals stage.
Gently brush the charcoal with olive oil and let it smolder for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix anko red bean paste, coconut sugar, lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, dried mint, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
Place a cold-smoked salmon piece on a grilling sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread a layer of the anko red bean paste mixture on top of the salmon, leaving a small border around the edges.
Place the grilling sheet with the salmon on the binchotan grill, away from the direct heat.
Smoke the salmon for 10 minutes, or until heated through and slightly caramelized.
Remove the salmon from the grill and let it cool to room temperature.
Cut the smoked salmon into small pieces and serve immediately, garnished with additional dried mint if desired.
